titleStmt.title: SII 9.419: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 419. (A.R. No. 401 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD NEAR HIREBAIL, A HAMLET OF SANKARANARAYANA, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This seems to be a record of a grant made in the reign of Bukkarāya but probably given effect to and put on stone in Hariyappa-Oḍeya's reign which is mentioned at the end. It is damaged and dated Śaka 1302 (current), Siddhārthi, Chaitra, śu. 1, Ādityavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1380 March 19 Saturday (not Sunday). It records that the Mahāpradhāna Maleya-Daṇṇāyaka had made a grant of land in the reign of Vīra-Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya for the service of the god Koḍagiya-Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva. The land was now made over to Kimiseṭṭi who was made responsible for conducting services to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābudayaśakavaruṣa 1302 neya sidhārtti
saṁvatsarada cayitra su 1 Ādityavāra śrīmanumaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ A
rirāyavibhāḍa bhāsege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa gajarājarā
ja rājaparamēsvara pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhipati śrīvī
rabukaṁṇaOḍeyara rājyādbhudayadaṁdu śrīmanuma
hāpradhānaṁ maleyadaṁṇāyakkaru koḍagiya śaṁkaranā
rāyaṇadēvarige muvāne Akiya nayivēdya Oṁdu naṁdābe
ḷakanu kayivaṇi tāṁḍeya makkiyali māḍida dharmadoḷage A
tāṁḍeya makiyanu mahamaneya kimiseṭiyarige kupā
ra Uru hatu Ā mūligaḷa hiriya baḷi Aṇavaṁtōpi
haḷiya kavilahaḷiya viṭhalavaḍahaḷiya veṁḍaEdahaḷi
ya Ā dēvara sēnabhōva yiṁtivaru taṁmoḷu Ēkastarā
gi Ā mahamaneya kimiseṭiyarige dhārāpūrvakavāgi bara
du koṭa patra Ā tāṁḍeya makkiya yikida kalloḷu
gaḷiṁda Oḷagaṇa catusīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa maki
ra niki niṭilu nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa sidha sādhya Ākṣiṇi
Āgāmi yiḍikavāda yiṁtī Aṣṭabhōgakke baha sā(ṁ)mya
sahitavāgi yeṟadu koṭu Ā kimiseṭiyaru kuḷugāḍa
ya nikki Āḷamāḍisi Ā bāḷiṁge saṁkaranārāyaṇadēva
rige Ā kimiseṭiyaru Ā bāḷu Aṁgaḍi gāṇakeṁ
saṁkaranārāyaṇa(ṁ)dēvarige kaṭikaṁḍa teṟu Oṁdu naṁdābeḷaku
varuśa 1 dakaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 nu naḍasuvaru yi
vāgi varu varuṣake Uravaruga 1 hoṁnanū yiki
dharmava naḍasi Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi saṁtati
yī dharmake Āru Aḷupidavaru vāraṇāsiyali sāvira kapile
ya koṁḍa pāpadali hōharu . sadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdhara . saṣṭivaruśasahasrāṇāṁ
krimi mahamaneya hariyapa
Oḍeyara rājyābhyudaya
Digital edition of SII 9.419 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
